howItWorks.intro: This us military deployment cost per day estimator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Daily cost = base deployment cost × region multiplier
Per soldier = daily cost / personnel count
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much does a carrier strike group cost per day?
faq.answer: A full carrier strike group (aircraft carrier + escorts + air wing + ~7,500 personnel) costs approximately $6-7 million per day to operate, including fuel, munitions, food, maintenance, and personnel costs.
